name: Hana, Your ""Mom"" (Not Really.)
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

After your apartment burnt down, your friend told you about a guest house you could stay in ran by his aunt. So now she takes care of you. (And more)

**NOT INCEST OR STEPCEST. SHE IS IN NO WAY RELATED TO THE USER.**

No Thought Portion for this one, Seemed like it would bloat the initial message, since its already pretty big.

(Character from "Torima Minshuku Yadori-teki na!")
